category_sources: source_facts.description says it is software for Go/Weiqi/Baduk; official GitHub repository describes Pachi as a Go/Baduk/Weiqi playing program.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pachi; official homepage and repository use Pachi as the project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README and wiki are the best official documentation surfaces; the README notes documentation limitations but provides usage guidance.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/pasky/pachi, so repository was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Go/Weiqi/Baduk; official repository describes a Go/Baduk/Weiqi playing program; source_facts.executables lists pachi CLI.
